name: Cake Tower HUD Plus
description:
蛋糕塔 Chapter 3 (Cake Team Towers) 专用纯客户端 HUD：自绘血量条、属性面板、队友头顶血条、怪物追踪。可拖拽 + ModMenu。
⚠ 实验性功能（可能有问题）：伤害统计 / 攻击者归属 / 伤害分配 (L) / K/D/A 统计 (N) / 每关战绩广播。仍在调优中，数值可能不准、归属可能误判、聊天广播默认关闭。
Client-only HUD for Cake Team Towers Chapter 3: custom health bars, stats panel, teammate overhead bars, mob tracking. Drag-to-position + ModMenu.
⚠ Experimental (may misbehave): combat analytics / attacker attribution / damage panel (L) / K/D/A stats (N) / per-stage chat report. Numbers may be off, attribution may misroute, chat broadcasts default OFF.

v6.0+ 服务端功能由 OnlyScoutCat 赞助 · 服务器 sc4.i9idc.com:12439
Server-side features (v6.0+) sponsored by OnlyScoutCat · sc4.i9idc.com:12439
